info.name: Wiz Review Service API
info.description: Complete API collection for Wiz Car Rental Review Service with Event Emission and Pagination

request.description: Get all reviews with pagination. Optionally filter by type.
Submit a vehicle review. Requires authentication. Emits 'review.created' event.

response.name: Submit Vehicle Review

request.description: Submit an owner review. Requires authentication. Emits 'review.owner_reviewed' event.

response.name: Submit Owner Review

request.description: Get reviews for a specific vehicle with pagination support

response.name: Get Vehicle Reviews (Paginated)

request.description: Get reviews for a specific owner with pagination support

response.name: Get Owner Reviews (Paginated)

request.description: Owner responds to a review. Requires authentication. Emits 'review.response_posted' event.
Mark a review as helpful. Requires authentication.
Report an inappropriate review. Requires authentication.

response.name: Report Review

request.description: Get review statistics for an owner. Requires authentication (owner or admin).

response.name: Get Owner Review Stats

request.description: Get review statistics for a vehicle. Requires authentication.

response.name: Get Vehicle Review Stats

request.description: Get platform-wide review statistics. Requires admin authentication.

response.name: All Reviews - Page 1
Vehicle Reviews Only
Owner Reviews Only
Reviews - Sorted by Highest Rating
Reviews - Custom Limit (20 per page)

request.description: Check service health including database and RabbitMQ connection
